title: [Skyship, Research]
description: A series of humanoid mannequins of varying size and body type line one side of the room, strapped to thick metal poles with leather belts.  Wide black wooden boards are placed at the base of each mannequin, and atop each board lies a figure of the same race as the mannequin looming over it.  These figures appear to be the subject of experimentation, with open crates of metal tools set alongside cut-open corpses in differing states of surgery.
